text: Breakfast and Toy Story. I love you. Somebody needs a haircut. Would you try a piece of sausage, sweetie? You try a piece of sausage? It's yummy. Very good, Jamie. Proud of you. It's yummy. Sweet. I think it's sucky. Yummy. I think it's yucky. It's not nice to say when someone makes you breakfast. You can just not eat it if you think something's yucky. But it's yummy, isn't it?
